questionHtml: A ball is thrown vertically downwards with an initial speed of 4.0 m s−1. The ball hits the ground with a speed of 16 m s−1. Air resistance is negligible. What is the time of fall and what is the distance travelled by the ball?

meta.title: A ball is thrown vertically downwards with an initial speed of 4.0 m s−1. The ball hits the ground with a speed of 16 m s−1. Air resistance is negligible. What is the time of fall
